notes: Verified the latest Vercel production deployment dpl_Hk17GH2Dq5ef5uWA1MubTeqNGj6C for commit 963142462 reached READY and was promoted to openmanager-ai.vercel.app.
Verified /dashboard rendered 'Synthetic OTel snapshot · 16:30 KST (slot 99/143)' and the cache-redis-dc1-01 server card showed MEM 91%.
Verified a fresh AI sidebar query 'cache-redis-dc1-01 메모리 사용률 몇 %야?' returned a successful streaming answer on production.
Verified the assistant response badge still renders 'Streaming AI · 서버 실시간 데이터 분석'.
Observed that the fresh AI answer returned 32% instead of the dashboard raw MEM 91%, and '분석 근거 상세 보기' still rendered only data/engine/period rows without the parity metadata contract block.
